criticalRules: Control port is refresh trigger, NOT clock
exprs line 0: color indices for each input (e.g., "1 1" for 2 inputs)
exprs line 7-8 hold the refresh period and buffer size in the verified examples
CRITICAL: Scope blocks MUST have a CLOCK_c block connected to their ControlPort (red top port) via a CommandControlLink, otherwise graph is empty.
Verified 1-input example is available in reference_blocks/CMSCOPE__1_input.xcos and uses realParameters width 5 with values [0, period, bufferSize, ymin, ymax]
Verified 2-input example keeps integerParameters width 11; reuse the exact parameter layout from the matching example instead of recalculating it from memory
Treat CMSCOPE parameter sizing as example-driven: copy either the verified 1-input or 2-input structure and then edit only the intended values
description: Multi-channel scope - displays multiple signals on same axis with color differentiation
anomalies: Complex exprs with 11 parameters including color codes
Verified 1-input and 2-input forms differ enough that hand-derived width formulas are easy to get wrong
realParameters width is 5 in the verified 1-input form and 7 in the bundled 2-input reference
Color mapping: 1 3 5 7... are color indices for each input
name: CMSCOPE
